# ITR Stats

> India's independent income tax dashboard. Live ITR processing statistics, refund guides, income data analysis, and free financial calculators — all based on official CBDT and Income Tax Department data.

ITR Stats tracks daily ITR filing and processing numbers pulled directly from the Income Tax e-filing portal. Data is updated twice daily. All calculators use official government data or published tax rules.

## Core Dashboard

- [Live ITR Dashboard](https://itrstats.in/): Daily ITR filing counts, processing queue, refund stats, and e-verification numbers. Updated twice daily from the IT portal API.
- [ITR Processing Stats](https://itrstats.in/itr-processing-stats/): How fast is the Income Tax Department processing returns? Daily processing rates, seasonal patterns, and current backlog.
- [Insights](https://itrstats.in/insights/): Multi-year ITR filing trends, category-wise breakdown, state-wise data, and form-wise comparisons using official CBDT statistics.

## ITR Refund Guides

- [ITR Refund Status Guide](https://itrstats.in/itr-refund-status/): What every ITR refund status means - Refund Initiated, Refund Sent to Bank, No Demand No Refund, Refund Failure, and more.
- [Why Is My ITR Refund Delayed?](https://itrstats.in/itr-refund-delayed/): 8 common reasons for ITR refund delays and how to fix each one.
- [How ITR Gets Processed at CPC](https://itrstats.in/itr-processed-at-cpc/): Step-by-step explanation of the CPC Bengaluru ITR processing pipeline from e-verification to refund credit.
- [ITR Refund Interest Under Section 244A](https://itrstats.in/itr-refund-interest/): How Section 244A interest works, when you are eligible for 0.5% per month interest on delayed refunds, and how to calculate it.

## Calculators

- [Income Tax Calculator](https://itrstats.in/calculator/income-tax/): Compare old vs new tax regime for FY 2025-26. Enter salary, HRA, deductions under 80C/80D and get exact tax liability under both regimes.
- [Income Percentile Calculator](https://itrstats.in/calculator/income-percentile/): Enter your annual income and see your percentile rank among 8.5 crore Indian taxpayers. Based on live CBDT ITR data.
- [SIP Calculator](https://itrstats.in/calculator/sip/): Calculate SIP returns with year-by-year growth chart and inflation-adjusted value.
- [PPF Calculator](https://itrstats.in/calculator/ppf/): PPF maturity amount with annual compounding at current 7.1% rate.
- [FD Calculator](https://itrstats.in/calculator/fd/): Fixed deposit maturity with quarterly compounding and TDS deduction.
- [EMI Calculator](https://itrstats.in/calculator/emi/): Loan EMI with full amortization schedule.
- [NPS Calculator](https://itrstats.in/calculator/nps/): NPS corpus at retirement with annuity income estimate.
- [HRA Calculator](https://itrstats.in/calculator/hra/): HRA exemption under Section 10(13A) - metro vs non-metro.
- [Gratuity Calculator](https://itrstats.in/calculator/gratuity/): Gratuity under Payment of Gratuity Act for government and private employees.
- [Lumpsum Calculator](https://itrstats.in/calculator/lumpsum/): One-time mutual fund investment growth calculator.
- [SWP Calculator](https://itrstats.in/calculator/swp/): Systematic Withdrawal Plan - how long your corpus lasts at a given monthly withdrawal.
- [GST Calculator](https://itrstats.in/calculator/gst/): Add or remove GST at 5%, 12%, 18%, 28% slabs.

## Data & Analysis

- [India Income Percentile 2026](https://itrstats.in/blog/india-income-percentile/): What income puts you in India's top 1% (Rs 35L+), top 5% (Rs 12L+), top 10% (Rs 7.4L+). Based on 8.5 crore CBDT ITR filings.
- [India's Income Distribution](https://itrstats.in/blog/income-distribution-india/): Full income bracket breakdown from 8.5 crore ITR filings. Only 1.1% earn above Rs 50 lakh. Nearly 70% earn under Rs 5 lakh.
- [State-wise ITR Filing](https://itrstats.in/blog/state-wise-itr-filing/): Which states file the most ITRs? Maharashtra, UP, Gujarat lead. State-level filing patterns and per-capita analysis.
- [ITR Form Comparison](https://itrstats.in/blog/itr-form-comparison/): ITR-1 vs ITR-2 vs ITR-3 vs ITR-4 - who should file which form.
- [ITR-1 Decline](https://itrstats.in/blog/itr1-decline/): Why ITR-1 filings are falling as a share of total returns - data analysis.
- [How Long Does ITR Refund Take?](https://itrstats.in/blog/itr-refund-time.html): Typical ITR refund timelines for salaried vs business taxpayers with historical data.

## Tax Guides

- [Budget 2026 ITR Deadlines](https://itrstats.in/blog/budget-2026-itr-deadlines/): All ITR filing deadlines announced in Budget 2026.
- [Tax Calendar 2026](https://itrstats.in/blog/tax-calendar-2026/): All important income tax dates for FY 2025-26 - advance tax, TDS filing, ITR deadlines.
- [Last Minute Tax Saving](https://itrstats.in/blog/last-minute-tax-saving/): Tax saving investments under 80C, 80D, NPS before March 31 deadline.
- [SIP Taxation](https://itrstats.in/blog/sip-taxation/): How mutual fund SIP gains are taxed - STCG vs LTCG, equity vs debt funds.
- [FD vs Liquid Fund](https://itrstats.in/blog/fd-vs-liquid-fund/): Tax efficiency comparison of bank FDs vs liquid mutual funds after indexation.
- [SGB Tax Changes](https://itrstats.in/blog/sgb-tax-changes/): Sovereign Gold Bond redemption tax rules after Budget 2024 amendments.

## HUF Tax Series

- [HUF Tax Guide](https://itrstats.in/blog/huf-tax-guide/): Complete guide to Hindu Undivided Family taxation - how HUF saves tax as a separate entity.
- [How to Open a HUF](https://itrstats.in/blog/huf-how-to-open/): Step-by-step process to create a HUF, open a bank account, and get a HUF PAN card.
- [HUF Tax Rules](https://itrstats.in/blog/huf-tax-rules/): Detailed HUF income tax rules - what income can be clubbed, deductions available, partition rules.
- [HUF ITR Filing](https://itrstats.in/blog/huf-itr-filing/): How to file ITR for a HUF - which form, what details, verification process.
- [HUF Investments](https://itrstats.in/blog/huf-investments/): What investments a HUF can make - PPF restrictions, 80C limits, FD in HUF name.

## About

- [About ITR Stats](https://itrstats.in/about.html): Independent project tracking India's income tax statistics. Built by Kartikey Rajvaidya.
